raw_consumer_statement:
Request a dispute against XXXX on XX/XX/2024 upon trying to resolve a flight arrangement and rental car appointment. I selected a completely different flight! My flight was set for XX/XX/XXXX from XXXX XXXX : am ( XXXX hour layover ) and return XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX am. The information first submitted by XXXX confirmed the dates on XXXX XXXX XXXX. However, on XXXX I received a booking from XXXX XXXX that leaves me in XXXX on XXXX for over XXXX hours ( I have XXXX XXXX  ) and arrives in XXXX XXXX XXXX pm and the rental car agency closes at XXXX : pm leaving me stranded in a foreign country. The route back to XXXX drops me off in XXXX at XXXX am overnight and I will not arrive to XXXX UNTIL XX/XX/XXXX! XXXX states that I should have looked at my itinerary to cancel within XXXX hours! The iteniary sent lists the date of return on XX/XX/2024. 
Since my last speak with XXXX, they have replaced the misleading confirmation with a detailed one. The latter would have immediately allowed me to cancel this flight reservation. As of today, XXXX, XXXX states that it will not alter the flight or rental car reservation. I must request Best Buy to not " honor '' such a transaction and to do so in a timely manner!
